message:
fix(cancel): replace asx_cancel_request walking skeleton with real delegation

asx_cancel_request was the last walking skeleton in the codebase —
it validated arguments but unconditionally returned ASX_OK without
propagating the cancellation.

Now delegates to asx_task_cancel(task, reason->kind), which performs
real state transitions (Running → CancelRequested), cleanup budget
allocation, witness creation, ghost checks, and trace emission.

Update test_types_parity to expect failure for non-existent task IDs
instead of the old always-OK behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
